description: Talk-pane perf investigation, remaining items. talk-clear-pending-on-jsonl-match has been refined twice and still has intermittent repro; latest tweak normalizes whitespace on both sides of the match. talk-scroll-on-pending-appear is new and not yet exercised.

items.before: When the approval menu (pendingPoll.value.pending) appears below the last turn, the Talk pane doesn't scroll to keep the menu in view — content has grown but the existing scroll-to-bottom listener only fires on turns.length changes (Talk.xmlui:27-29). User has to manually scroll down to see / interact with the new menu.
items.after: Added a ChangeListener keyed on pendingPoll.value && pendingPoll.value.pending && pendingPoll.value.pending.id that calls window.scrollAllToBottom() when the pending tool id changes. Guarded with window.wasPinnedToBottom() so manual scroll-up isn't yanked back. Separate listener from the existing turns.length / pendingUserText scroll triggers.
